PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetIfStatementImpl(IF_STATEMENT)
    PsiElement(IF)('if')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
      PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''a'')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=~)('=~')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
            PsiElement(REGEX)('/abc/')
        PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetIfStatementImpl(IF_STATEMENT)
    PsiElement(IF)('if')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
      PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''a'')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=~)('=~')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"abc"')
        PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetIfStatementImpl(IF_STATEMENT)
    PsiElement(IF)('if')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
      PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''a'')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=~)('=~')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
        PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetIfStatementImpl(IF_STATEMENT)
    PsiElement(IF)('if')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
      PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''a'')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=~)('=~')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionAdditiveImpl(EXPRESSION_ADDITIVE)
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"abc"')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(+)('+')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"def"')
        PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiElement(})('}')
